name: Fixed Income Analyser
description: Exhaustive ranked survey of fixed-income instruments (dividends, preferreds, sukuk, bonds, deposits) across 13 currencies — USD, EUR, GBP, CHF, JPY, AUD, CAD, SGD, AED, INR, ZAR, BRL, MXN — with risk, reputation, inflation-adjusted true returns and an income calculator for HNW investors.
